creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Comment on attachment 212928
update to 0.41.0

I have had the same patch ready and tested for quite a while. I postponed the submission only because the new version does not support Python2 any more. Since I had no compelling reason to use the newest version, nor to abandon py2, I decided to wait until either py2 is generally dropped in ports, or someone asks for the update...

The patch is OK to commit.
